titleStmt.title: SII 28.275: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 275. (A.R. No. 429 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, central shrine, on the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front.

p.hi: Tribhuvanachchakravartti emmaṇḍalamum koṇḍaruḷiya Sundara-pāṇḍya. Year 9, Māśi 19.

summary.p: Records a royal gift of 2000 kuḻi of first grade wet land under the irrigation reservoir-Kulaśēkhara-peri-ēri as tax-free land (iṟai-ili) with entitlement to all cesses (aṉaittu-āyam) for tirunandavaṉa-ppuṟam (land meant to maintain those tending the Gods flower-garden) for God Tirukkāmīśvaram-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār, the God (uḍaiyār) of Āṟagaḷūr in Āṟṟūr-kūṟṟam in Milāḍu alias Jaṉaṉātha-vaḷanāḍu. The record was attested by Āchchaṉ Gaṇapati-āḻvāṉ alias Kāḍu-veṭṭi of Kappalūr alias Ulagaḷanda-chōḻa-nallūr in Muttūṟṟu-kkūṟṟam in Pāṇḍi-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ḥ svastiśrī . tirumukappaṭi śrīkoccaṭapaṉma
rāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamum ko
ṇṭaruḷiya śrīsundarapāṇṭiya tevaṟkku Oṉpa
tāvatu mācimātam pattoṉpataān tiya
ti milāṭākiya jaṉaṉāta vaḷanāṭṭu Āṟṟur
kūṟṟattu Āṟakaḷuruṭaiyār tirukkāmi
śvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku tirunantavaṉa
ppuṟa Iṟaiyiliāka Ivūr kulacekaraṉ pe
ri Eriyil mutaṟtarattile naṉcey Aṉai
ttāyam Uṭpaṭa Iraṇṭāyiram kuḻi
Iṟaiyiliyāka kuṭuttom Ippaṭikku Olai piṭi
pāṭāka tiruccūlattāpaṉam paṇṇi cantiṟātitta varai
yum celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷ
vatu Ippaṭikku pāṇṭi maṇṭalattu muttūṟṟuk kūṟ
ṟattu kappalūrāṉa Ulakaḷantacoḻanallūr Āc
caṉ kaṇapati Āḻvāṉāṉa kāṭuveṭṭi Eḻuttu §
tiru Eḻuttu ḥ Ivai tulliyam §
Digital edition of SII 28.275 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
